author: Executor / Claude
related_files: `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1` ‚Äî moved the inner loop, scope guard, audit log, staging, and commit into an isolated git worktree at `<parent>/dispatch-worktrees/<DispatchId>`; added `Resolve-DispatchWorktreePath`, `Test-DispatchWorktreeCleanupDecision`, `Format-DispatchWorktreeStatus`, `Format-DispatchWorktreeAuditSection`, `Format-DispatchOrphanRecoveryComment` pure helpers; reworked `Save-OrphanDispatchWorktree` to return the `.interrupt<N>` archive path; threaded the archive/preserved path into every orphan-recovery comment, the dispatch audit log body, the result comment, and local stdout; added the worktree-aware `WorktreeRoot` plumbing to `Write-DispatchLog`, `Get-RepoRelativePathForQueue`, and `Get-QueueStatusEntries`; preserved every ISSUE-230 publish-mode semantic (`main` / `branch` / `pr` / `-NoPublish`), retry/label taxonomy, progress comments, result comment, and issue-close behavior; deleted the pre-ISSUE-231 stash/checkout dance.

`AI_DISPATCH_AUTOMATION.md` ‚Äî added `¬ß7.2 Queue-runner worktree isolation` covering the sibling convention, success-vs-failure cleanup table, collision safety, and the new "Durable worktree-status reporting" sub-section that documents how the audit log, result comment, orphan-recovery comments, and stdout each surface the worktree path.

`AI_DISPATCH_PARALLEL.md` ‚Äî added the short ISSUE-231 cross-reference noting the queue runner now uses the same sibling-worktree primitive as its default serial run boundary (links to `AI_DISPATCH_AUTOMATION.md ¬ß7.2`).
`tools/dispatch-tests/Resolve-DispatchWorktreePath.Tests.ps1` ‚Äî Pester coverage for the deterministic sibling-of-repo worktree path resolver.

`tools/dispatch-tests/Test-DispatchWorktreeCleanupDecision.Tests.ps1` ‚Äî Pester coverage for the layered preserve/archive/remove cleanup decision (publish-hard-failed > blocked > retry > terminal-failure > terminal-success).
`tools/dispatch-tests/Format-DispatchWorktreeStatus.Tests.ps1` ‚Äî Pester coverage for the preserved/removed/archived status line formatter consumed by the result comment and stdout.

`tools/dispatch-tests/Issue231-WorktreeIsolation.Tests.ps1` ‚Äî source-level invariants on the queue script: `git worktree add -b $branch`, `git -C $worktreePath` staging/commit, no primary-checkout toggle to the dispatch branch.

`tools/dispatch-tests/Issue231-DispatchLogPathStableAfterCleanup.Tests.ps1` ‚Äî Pester regression that pins the stable `$dispatchLogRel` capture before any worktree cleanup clears `$script:DispatchWorktreeRoot`.

`tools/dispatch-tests/Format-DispatchOrphanRecoveryComment.Tests.ps1` ‚Äî **new** focused coverage for the orphan-recovery comment formatter; verifies the `.interrupt<N>` archive path and deterministic `git -C "$path" status --short --branch` / `log --oneline -5` / `git worktree remove "$path"` commands appear in the comment body for every orphan stage, plus source-level invariants that `Invoke-OrphanRecovery` consumes the formatter.

`tools/dispatch-tests/Format-DispatchWorktreeAuditSection.Tests.ps1` ‚Äî **new** focused coverage for the audit-log worktree section formatter and an integration check that `Write-DispatchLog` embeds the section into the committed log body when `-WorktreeRoot` is supplied.
